headline: Arista Networks, Inc. (ANET) announced the 7060XE7 Series
summary: Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) is one of the 10 Best Fundamentally Strong Stocks to Buy for Long Term. On 9 June, Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) announced the 7060XE7 Series, a portfolio of 1.6-terabit networking platforms for rack-scale AI infrastructure. The firm said the systems help scale-up and scale-out AI fabrics and are designed for air, […]
